metadata.description: Community marketplace of plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: switch-provider

plugins.name: plugin-development

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance with evals and benchmarks. Originally from anthropics/skills, community-maintained
